context: Checks whether the agent understands Quarkus ArC build-time bean discovery, @Named ambiguity, programmatic lookup visibility, and targeted remedies.

checklist.name: Named ambiguity
checklist.description: Explains why using @Named as the only discriminator can leave a default qualifier/type ambiguity in this setup.

checklist.name: Explicit qualifier strategy
checklist.description: Uses an explicit CDI qualifier or project-supported identifier mechanism and updates injection sites consistently.

checklist.name: Dependency discovery
checklist.description: Checks Jandex/beans.xml/index-dependency options and bean-defining annotations for the dependency JAR rather than assuming classpath presence is enough.

checklist.name: Bean definition details
checklist.description: Checks scopes, producers, alternatives, priorities, and proxyability/constructor constraints where relevant.

checklist.name: Programmatic lookup and removal
checklist.description: Connects string/config-driven CDI lookup to build-time reachability limitations and proposes a targeted unremovable/lookup registration or explicit registry design.

checklist.name: No global disable by default
checklist.description: Rejects disabling unused-bean removal globally unless targeted evidence shows that is the only viable compatibility choice.

checklist.name: Injection and lifecycle discipline
checklist.description: Prefers required constructor injection where supported and avoids unnecessary field injection or side-effect-heavy startup callbacks.

checklist.name: Augmentation and runtime tests
checklist.description: Includes dev/test plus packaged JVM and native/production-like checks for discovery, ambiguity, selection, and startup.

checklist.name: Evidence and staging
checklist.description: Separates the three root causes and proposes independently verifiable, rollback-friendly batches.
